goal: Implement or design safe insertion for eligible normal scalar settings that currently use Hyprland defaults.
whatWasImplemented: Documented the safe insertion constraints for normal scalar settings only.
Added a safe-env-only missing/default insertion planner and executor.

The executor creates a backup, verifies backup bytes, appends a deterministic Hyprland Settings section, rereads the file, verifies the inserted value, and restores on forced write or verification failure.
Kept active safe-batch missing/default behavior blocked.
Added deterministic tests that assert missing/default insertion remains blocked in active copy.
whatWasNotImplemented: No production insertion executor was enabled.
No real config insertion was attempted.
No UI control for insertion target selection was activated.

safetyBoundaries.allowedTarget: future fixture-only normal scalar insertion planner

blockers: Needs UI confirmation for production target selection.
Needs review before wiring insertion to Apply.
nextRecommendedWork: Add disabled UI scaffolding for insertion target review, then review whether the safe-env executor can become a gated production path.
